name: Asparagus with Blue Cheese and Walnut Relish
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Blue cheese, without rind and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the blue cheese relish: In a bowl, mix together crumbled blue cheese, chopped walnuts, chopped green onions, chopped parsley, and grated lemon zest.
- If making ahead, prepare the relish up to this point, cover, and refrigerate. Bring to room temperature 30 minutes before serving.
2. Prepare the asparagus: Trim off and discard the tough, woody ends of each asparagus stalk.
3. Cook the asparagus: In a large deep saucepan or skillet, bring enough water to cover the asparagus to a boil. Add salt to the boiling water, then add the trimmed asparagus. Simmer until just tender, about 3-5 minutes.
4. Drain the asparagus well and season with more salt if desired.
5. To serve, arrange the cooked asparagus on a heated platter or shallow serving bowl. Top each piece with a generous amount of blue cheese relish.
6. Serve hot.
